basic_info.short_form: East West College of Engineering Bangalore

address.address: Major Akshay Girish Kumar Rd, Sector A, Yelahanka New Town, India

pos_sentences: The scholarship like ssp,nsp are there and it is quite we asy to avail.

Freshers they'll do freshers party like after a month of time and it will be grand and they got good library the atmosphere in library is good and all the textbook related to all the courses are in there
The hostel facilities are clean and hygienic with good facilities, the meal quality is good and the menu will be different for everydays and the hostel fees is 70000 .
Established with a vision to impart quality education and foster innovation, the college has become a prominent name in the region.
The process of admission is quite easy as per the quota is been assigned to the respected department.

Our course curriculum in vtu is good they teach us what is necessary for our work field in it companies the faculty is good we got separate teacher for each subject and their teaching is good we understand the topic
The internship provided are useful and help to gain knowledge.
neg_sentences: There is no sports competition,no wifi, with no proper internet facility. be, diploma,pu students will be play in same small ground. poor teaching methods. infrastructure of this college is not good. scope for civil is less.. totally im not like....
No merit scholarship but govt will provide ssp for only those whose family income is low.
The college hostel food is worst and canteen was not nice
There will be more strictness in ae branch which is the worst thing.

stream.name: Computer Science And Engineering
